question: Will the factory workers walk out over the pay dispute?

requirements.claim_or_quantity: If any group of workers ceases work in protest over the pay dispute before 2023-07-01, outcome is walkout; otherwise no_walkout.
requirements.why_relevant: the terminal outcome standing as of the question date sets the base rate
